lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਨਿਰਗੁਨੁ ਗੁਨੁ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu niragun gun kachhoo na boojhai |
lines.english: This worthless person has not appreciated in the least, all the good deeds done for him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਧਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਬਸਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jih prasaad dhar aoopar sukh baseh |
lines.english: By His Grace, you abide in comfort upon the earth.
Are there to feed you as you rest.
If you bless him with forgiveness, O Nanak, only then will he be saved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਮੀਤ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਸਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sut bhraat meet banitaa sang haseh |
lines.english: With your children, siblings, friends and spouse, you laugh.
By His Grace, you drink in cool water.
You are provided with all the necessities of life.
By His Grace, you enjoy all sorts of pleasures.
You have peaceful breezes and priceless fire.
and yet, you forsake Him and attach yourself to others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨੇ ਹਸਤ ਪਾਵ ਕਰਨ ਨੇਤ੍ਰ ਰਸਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: deene hasat paav karan netr rasanaa |
lines.english: He gave you hands, feet, ears, eyes and tongue,
Such sinful mistakes cling to the blind fools;
From beginning to end, He is our Protector,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee sevaa nav nidh paavai |
lines.english: Serving Him, the nine treasures are obtained,
Nanak: uplift and save them, God! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਕਰੈ ਗਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis siau preet na karai gavaar |
lines.english: and yet, the ignorant do not give their love to Him.
Our Lord and Master is Ever-present, forever and ever,
and yet, the spiritually blind believe that He is far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਸਿਉ ਮੂੜਾ ਮਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: taa siau moorraa man nahee laavai |
lines.english: and yet, the foolish do not link their minds with Him.
and yet, the ignorant fool forgets Him.
Forever and ever, this person makes mistakes;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਟਹਲ ਪਾਵੈ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee ttehal paavai daragah maan |
lines.english: In His service, one obtains honor in the Court of the Lord,
O Nanak, the Infinite Lord is our Saving Grace. ||3||
They renounce Truth and embrace falsehood.
Forsaking the jewel, they are engrossed with a shell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਛਡਨਾ ਸੁ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo chhaddanaa su asathir kar maanai |
lines.english: That which passes away, they believe to be permanent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਜਾਇ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਸ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: chhodd jaae tis kaa sram karai |
lines.english: They struggle for what they must eventually leave.
They turn away from the Lord, their Help and Support, who is always with them.
That which is immanent, they believe to be far off.
like donkeys, they are in love with the mud.
They have fallen into the deep, dark pit.
Nanak: lift them up and save them, O Merciful Lord God! ||4||
They wash off the sandalwood paste;
They curse others day and night.
Outwardly, they wear religious robes, but within is the filth of Maya.
They belong to the human species, but they act like animals.
Outwardly, they display knowledge, meditation and purification,
They cannot conceal this, no matter how hard they try.
but within clings the dog of greed.
The fire of desire rages within; outwardly they apply ashes to their bodies.
There is a stone around their neck - how can they cross the unfathomable ocean?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਸੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai antar basai prabh aap |
lines.english: Those, within whom God Himself abides
By listening, how can the blind find the path?
- O Nanak, those humble beings are intuitively absorbed in the Lord. ||5||
Take hold of his hand, and then he can reach his destination.
How can the mute sing the Songs of the Lord?
How can a riddle be understood by the deaf?
Say 'night', and he thinks you said 'day'.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤਨ ਕਰੈ ਤਉ ਭੀ ਸੁਰ ਭੰਗ ॥
lines.translit: jatan karai tau bhee sur bhang |
lines.english: He may try, but his voice will fail him.
How can the cripple climb up the mountain?
He simply cannot go there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਾਈ ਸੁ ਆਵੈ ਨ ਚੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: sang sahaaee su aavai na cheet |
lines.english: The Lord, our Help and Support, is always with us, but the mortal does not remember Him.
Nanak: by Your Grace, please save me. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਾਰ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮੈ ਦੀਨੁ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: karataar karunaa mai deen benatee karai |
lines.english: O Creator, Lord of Mercy - Your humble servant prays;
He shows love to his enemies.
He enjoys the games of pleasure and the tastes of Maya.
He lives in a castle of sand.
He believes them to be permanent - this is the belief of his mind.
Hate, conflict, sexual desire, anger, emotional attachment,
Death does not even come to mind for the fool.
falsehood, corruption, immense greed and deceit:
